hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; changed=$({ git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null; } | sort -u); [ -z "$changed" ] && exit 0; suggestions=""; echo "$changed" | grep -q '\.py$' && suggestions="pytest"; echo "$changed" | grep -qE '\.(js|ts|jsx|tsx)$' && { [ -n "$suggestions" ] && suggestions="$suggestions, npm test" || suggestions="npm test"; }; echo "$changed" | grep -q '.github/workflows/' && { [ -n "$suggestions" ] && suggestions="$suggestions, check GitHub Actions" || suggestions="check GitHub Actions"; }; [ -n "$suggestions" ] && echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Test suggestion: $suggestions\"}" || true
